overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character standing on a high rooftop overlooking a gothic cityscape at night. The scene features atmospheric rain, sweeping searchlights, neon signage, and a large full moon illuminating the dark urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop ledge overlooking gothic metropolis

agents.ego_description: Batman stands motionless on the rooftop edge, silhouetted against the moonlit cityscape while observing the urban environment below

glowing red neon sign with 'ARKHAM' lettering on a building facade
large bright full moon visible through cloudy night sky
tall building with art deco architectural styling and illuminated windows
decorative metal railing along the edge of the rooftop
bright white searchlight beam sweeping across the city from the left

segments.scene_description: Batman stands motionless on a high rooftop ledge overlooking the gothic cityscape of Gotham at night. The full moon illuminates the scene while distant art deco buildings and a prominent clock tower dominate the skyline, with the Arkham sign glowing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop ledge overlooking gothic metropolis

white vehicle drives along the street visible in the lower right portion of the frame

notable_agents.action: white car driving along the street below the rooftop from left to right

segments.scene_description: A bright searchlight beam sweeps across the cityscape from left to right, briefly illuminating the buildings. Below, a white vehicle drives along the street as Batman continues to observe from his perch, with the camera panning slightly to follow the light's movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop ledge overlooking gothic metropolis

events.description: Batman raises his right arm toward his face while his cape billows dramatically in the wind

agents.ego_description: Batman raises his arm in a gesture toward his face while his cape flows in the wind, then returns to a neutral observing stance

segments.scene_description: The searchlight passes out of view and the vehicle exits the frame. Batman raises his right arm toward his face in a gesture while his cape billows dramatically in the wind, then settles back into a neutral stance as the scene returns to stillness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a moment of brooding stillness on a high rooftop that is briefly interrupted by the sweeping motion of city lights before returning to a quiet, atmospheric vigil. It begins with Batman standing motionless on a ledge overlooking a gothic cityscape, where a full moon illuminates art deco buildings, a distant clock tower, and a glowing Arkham sign. As the camera pans slightly, a bright searchlight beam sweeps across the skyline from left to right, momentarily lighting up the architecture and a white vehicle driving on the street below. The scene then shifts back to a focus on the figure as the light and vehicle exit the frame, prompting Batman to raise his arm toward his face while his cape billows dramatically in the wind. Finally, the movement subsides and he settles back into a neutral stance as the environment returns to its initial state of nocturnal stillness.
